inputs.label: Customer Demand (per day)
inputs.businessContext: Daily customer demand; used to calculate takt time. Lean manufacturing standard.

inputs.label: Available Working Time (per day)
inputs.businessContext: Total available work time per day (e.g., 8 hours = 28800 sec). Lean standard.

inputs.label: Process Steps
inputs.businessContext: Number of distinct process steps in the value stream.

inputs.label: Cycle Time per Step (average)
inputs.businessContext: Average cycle time for each process step. Lean VSM metric.

inputs.label: Changeover Time
inputs.businessContext: Time to switch from one product to another. SMED related.

inputs.label: Uptime (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of time equipment is operational. OEE metric.

inputs.label: Defect Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of defective units. Six Sigma quality metric.

inputs.label: Work-in-Process Inventory (units)
inputs.businessContext: Total units in WIP across all steps. Lean metric.

inputs.label: Batch Size
inputs.businessContext: Number of units processed together. Lean batch size.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in input data accuracy. Affects output adjustment.

thresholds.defectRate: defectRate > 5 ? 'High defect rate; consider Six Sigma DMAIC' : ''
thresholds.cycleTimeVsTakt: cycleTime > taktTime ? 'Cycle time exceeds takt time; bottleneck' : ''

formulas.bottleneckIdentification: cycleTime > taktTime ? 'Bottleneck at step with cycle time > takt time' : 'No bottleneck'

hiddenLossDrivers: cycleTime > taktTime ? 'Cycle time exceeds takt time' : ''
suggestedActions: defectRate > 5 ? 'Implement Six Sigma DMAIC to reduce defects' : ''
uptime < 80 ? 'Conduct OEE analysis and improve maintenance' : ''
cycleTime > taktTime ? 'Apply line balancing or add capacity' : ''
changeoverTime > 10 ? 'Implement SMED to reduce changeover time' : ''
